{{Quote|Admiral Jimas Veltraa, who perished in the defense of Taris against the surprise advance of Mandalorian forces along three fronts (now known by the popular media as 'The Onslaught'), was memorialized in a service at Admiralty Plaza on Coruscant.|An article in ''[[The Admiral's List]]''|<ref name="jimas" />}}
'''Admiralty Plaza''' was a [[plaza]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] that housed the [[Admiralty (Galactic Republic)/Legends|Admiralty]] of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Each [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the Republic Navy had their own office at Admiralty Plaza, and orders were issued out to the Navy from there. In [[3964 BBY]], Admiralty Plaza was the site of the memorial service of Admiral [[Jimas Veltraa]], who had been [[Death/Legends|killed]] in action defending the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] from [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Taris Siege|siege]].

==Description==
Admiralty [[Plaza]] was a square on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], that housed the [[Admiralty (Galactic Republic)|Admiralty]] of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the era of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Regardless of [[Military rank/Legends|rank]], each [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the Republic Navy received an office at Admiralty Plaza and a full clerical staff—from there, the Admiralty issued directives to the rest of the Navy.<ref name="kotorcg">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|Upon arrival at Admiralty Plaza, sources report that the Admiral immediately submitted his resignation over the loss of Battle Group Serroco and flagship ''Courageous''. The Admiral of the Fleet promptly refused to accept the resignation, instead convoking a private briefing for the Admiral and his companions. Afterward, the Admiral of the Fleet publicly commended Karath's performance.|An article in ''The Admiral's List''|<ref name="karath">{{KOTORbackups|22}}</ref>}}
In [[3964 BBY]], the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans kicked off their war with the Republic in earnest, commencing a major offensive aimed at the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. With the shattering of the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]] meant to defend the world, Admiral [[Jimas Veltraa]] reformed the Republic Navy's scattered Outer Rim forces and did [[Taris Siege|battle]] with the Mandalorians above Taris. Veltraa was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in action, however, and was memorialized in a service at Admiralty Plaza.<ref name="jimas" /> The war was finally underway, and military production kicked into overdrive—with the [[Rendili/Vanjervalis Drive Yards|yards]] at [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]] churning out a [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] every ten [[Standard day/Legends|days]], there were more career opportunities in the Republic Navy than ever before.<ref name="kotorcg" />

Soon, Admiralty Plaza, once considered to be merely a retirement home for over-the-hill [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]], became a heavily desired posting.<ref name="kotorcg" /> A later campaign in the war saw a massive Republic [[Battle of Serroco|defeat]] at [[Serroco]] where [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]] narrowly escaped death at Mandalorian hands, and eventually limped back to Coruscant. After arriving at Admiralty Plaza, Karath immediately tendered his resignation to the [[Unidentified Admiral of the Fleet|Admiral of the Fleet]], although it was not accepted. Afterward, the Admiral of the Fleet publicly commended Karath for his bravery.<ref name="karath" />

==Inhabitants==
Each admiral in the Republic Navy,<ref name="kotorcg" /> including the Admiral of the Fleet,<ref name="karath" /> had an office and a clerical staff at Admiralty Plaza at the time of the Mandalorian Wars. There were other naval personnel stationed at Admiralty Plaza, and it had become quite the desirable posting during the war.<ref name="kotorcg" />

==Behind the scenes==
Admiralty Plaza was first mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]'', an in-universe news report appearing on the last page of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] issue [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]], written by [[John Jackson Miller]], published by [[Dark Horse Comics]],<ref name="jimas" /> and released on [[January 31]], [[2007]].<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/14-394/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-13|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #13}}</ref>
